name: pi-loom
description: Pi extension workspace focused on durable AI-native constitutional, research, initiative, specification, planning, ticket, worker, critique, Ralph orchestration, and documentation memory.

scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts biome.json README.md packages
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts biome.json README.md packages
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.check:ci: biome ci package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts biome.json README.md packages && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
